nodes.label: Fetch the configuration file using the App ID (which is printed in the output of the previous command): `npx -y firebase-tools@latest apps:sdkconfig ANDROID <APP_ID> --project <PROJECT_ID>` *Example output extraction to file:* ` # (Output must be saved as app/google-services.json)`
